## Summary / 变更摘要

What does this PR change, and why is it needed?

## Related Issue / 关联问题

Links, issues, or background context:

## Scope / 影响范围

- [ ] Action inputs or outputs
- [ ] Prompt or model behavior
- [ ] Label mapping or rerun behavior
- [ ] Comment rendering or issue mutation
- [ ] Documentation or examples only
- [ ] CI / release only

## Compatibility / 兼容性

- [ ] No breaking change
- [ ] Breaking change

Migration notes or behavior changes:

## Validation / 验证

- [ ] Validate workflow passed
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed
- [ ] README.md and README.zh.md updated if needed
- [ ] Examples updated if needed

Commands, logs, screenshots, or workflow links:

## Notes / 备注

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
